infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Inertia uses the camera to take photos of meals so it can estimate their nutrition.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Inertia accesses photos so you can pick existing meal images to log.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Inertia saves meal photos you capture so you can review them later.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Inertia uses Face ID to lock your nutrition data when biometric privacy lock is enabled.
infoPlist.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: Inertia asks for permission to deliver more relevant ads. Declining still shows non-personalized ads.

plugins.cameraPermission: Inertia uses the camera to take photos of meals so it can estimate their nutrition.
